image:image.image:title: Jordanian Mansaf — Shamiat Restaurant, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Jordanian Mansaf with jameed yogurt and tender lamb, served at Shamiat on Sheikh Zayed Road, Duja Tower, Dubai.

image:image.image:title: Mansaf Mlahea — Shamiat Restaurant Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Mansaf Mlahea — bulgur, jameed, fried kibbeh and lamb — a Shamiat signature dish.

image:image.image:title: Charcoal-grilled Lamb Chops — Shamiat Restaurant, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Five-piece char-grilled lamb chops from Shamiat's mangal grill, Trade Centre First, Dubai.

image:image.image:title: Mixed Grill Platter — Shamiat Syrian Restaurant Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Sharing mixed grill platter of kebab, meat and chicken skewers at Shamiat on Sheikh Zayed Road.

image:image.image:title: Shamiat Kunafa — Arabic dessert, Sheikh Zayed Road Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Shamiat's fresh kunafa — warm cheese pastry, rose syrup and crushed pistachio, made in-house daily.

image:image.image:title: Oze Lamb Special — Shamiat Restaurant, Sheikh Zayed Road Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Oze lamb — slow-cooked lamb neck on spiced rice, a Levantine banquet dish at Shamiat.

image:image.image:title: Fattoush Salad — Syrian mezze at Shamiat Restaurant Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Fattoush salad with sumac, pomegranate molasses and fried bread, from Shamiat's mezze menu.

image:image.image:title: The Shamiat Spread — Syrian & Levantine feast, Sheikh Zayed Road Dubai
image:image.image:caption: A full Shami spread at Shamiat Restaurant — mezze, charcoal grills and mains on Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai.

image:image.image:title: Shamiat Restaurant — authentic Syrian kitchen, Dubai
image:image.image:caption: Shamiat Restaurant logo — authentic Syrian and Levantine kitchen, Duja Tower, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai.
